title: Alsine clevelandii
taxonomy: Alsine clevelandii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Alsine, which is commonly known as a group of wintergreen plants. Alsine clevelandii is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is typically found in dry areas with limestone soils. Alsine clevelandii is sometimes referred to as Cleveland's wintergreen.
